card_description: Timothy Leary is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the McKenna brothers' "Hologram Universe" theory (from *The Invisible Landscape*) as the most accurate model for his 3-74 experiences."
